text:
Drift (, rom. Dorifuto) is a spell card that can be found in the Greed Island game. It transports the caster to a random city or town they have not visited yet.
__NOTOC__

| colspan="3" align="center" |Go to a random un-visited town. If all towns have been visited, player stays at the same place and the card disappears.

|

Summary

It allows the user to randomly transport to a previously un-visited town or city. This card is used when trying to find a particular location that hasn't been visited yet. It is also a safe way to explore the game randomly. If all the game's locations have been found, the card is destroyed and the player remains in the same place.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.1016 :: 
行ったことのない街へ飛ぶ。（全ての街に行ったことがある場合、その場から動かずカードは破壊される。）
|-
![Eng]
|No.1016 :: Drift 
Fly to an unvisited town. (In the situation where all towns have been too, you do not move and the card is destroyed.)
|}

Trivia

In Chapter 183, at Biscuit's suggestion, Killua uses this card to try and find the city of Limeiro.
